Anindita Majumder 15:12
» Not sure if you are aware of the TS readiness initiative but basically -
• You will be assigned to the TSEXP-3094 (TS experts Readiness ticket) which is created for TS to work on the readiness for SPM-4005.
• You will perform the RICE analysis (also see the screenshot below) and move the ticket to the intended state.
• Once the deliverables (Triage checklist) are completed you can close the ticket.
Let me know if you have any questions! You can also post it to #ts-readiness channel. Refer Atlas Readiness Resources to more about the Readiness process.
